chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-272 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGE(S) _____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.1347/2022 (Stay/A) 2. For hearing of main case. 07.04.2025 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondents 2 & 4 Mr. Muhammad Javed, advocate, holds brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent no.3 Per learned counsel for petitioner, this petition may be disposed of with direction that the fate of security be subject to outcome of SCRA No.02/2021. Learned counsel for respondents articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Gulsher/PS
